message: I hate to say it, but there aren't many people here, are there? I thought it would be more crowded since they said it was a party.
I heard it's just a gathering for the co-stars.
So I guess this is about what I should expect?
If that's the case, I wish they had called Ted properly. It's boring without him.
Ouch!
It's my first time at something like this, but surprisingly everyone is quite plain.
Isn't this about what you would normally expect?
Really? I bought this dress just for tonight!
It looks great on you.
It was pretty expensive, though.
Can I expense it?
I'm always glad to be invited to any party.
When Meryl and Jennifer showed up, the guys practically had their noses growing three centimeters!
No way that's true.
It's a metaphor.
I'm probably the only one feeling like reality is slipping away more and more.
It's a memorable night being able to see and talk to such a glamorous lineup.
Make sure to thank Guy and Director Fabar.
I did say thank you, but isn't showing appreciation through putting in effort when you get the request more meaningful?
If I can get the request, that is.
Don't worry, I'm sure a request will come. I'm convinced of that.
Ah, why didn't I bring my camera? I really messed up.
I don't know the movie title, but the star is my beloved Ted.
I've never heard of an actor named Ted.
Huh? You've never heard of Ted? You're not really a Boss American, are you?
Would you go that far?
Ted is the hottest actor right now, you know. Though, I doubt it will make sense to the Boss.
I think it's a movie about baseball, but I'm not really interested in the content itself.
If you say that, the director will cry.
Well, after all, it comes down to the main character being the issue.
If it gets a wide release, I have to see it.
I think she's basically a good girl... but does she really want to work at our office?
That's just a joke, right?
It seems like that's not entirely the case.
Why?
I mean, whenever she's around, she keeps asking about our office and the boss. It's kinda concerning.
She's not a bad girl, you know.
I'm sure, but I find her kinda hard to deal with.
If you're that curious, why not just talk to her directly? I won’t stop you.
I've got a bad feeling about this.
What's up this time?
It seems like she really intends to come to our office.
Just to hang out?
Boss, please don’t say boring things. Honestly, that doesn't suit you.
If she joined our office as a detective assistant,
what would happen to me?
For now, you can rest easy because that's not happening.
'For now' means...
super anxious.
I really dislike this.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
